name: trade_press_batch_v7_candidate_audit_v1

items.label: correct_candidate

items.title: Schneider Electric to invest $700M in US manufacturing

items.title: Hitachi unveils $1B grid manufacturing investment, including Virginia transformer factory
items.label: correct_candidate

items.title: As load grows, Southern raises spending plan to $81B
items.label: correct_candidate
items.reason: Explicit utility spending-plan increase tied to demand growth.

items.title: Power enclosure maker AVL to establish its first US plant
items.label: correct_candidate
items.reason: New plant establishment is direct physical buildout.

items.title: Hitachi Energy commits $250M to address transformer shortage
items.label: correct_candidate

items.title: DTE inks first data center deal to grow electric load 25%
items.label: correct_candidate
items.reason: Concrete signed demand plus explicit load growth implies real utility buildout pressure.

items.title: Italy-based Westrafo to build its first US transformer plant
items.label: correct_candidate
items.reason: New transformer plant is direct manufacturing buildout.

notes: The v7 candidate set contains no remaining utility pipeline or load-forecast artifacts without concrete spend or signed-demand context.
Residual risk is now concentrated in schema failures, not false-positive candidates.
